news_headlines: US markets decline Apr 23: S&P -0.41%, Nasdaq -0.89% — tech sell-off on Meta layoffs
Oil extends rally: Brent $106.25 (+1.1%), WTI $96.84 (+1.0%) as Iran/Hormuz tensions persist
Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks
Meta to cut 10% of workforce (CNBC); Microsoft plans voluntary buyout for up to 7% of US workers
US soldier arrested for $400K Polymarket bet on Maduro capture using inside info
Yahoo Finance: Cathie Wood buys $900K of surging megacap stock
Bloomberg: Amazon-backed X-Energy raises $1.02B in nuclear IPO
Trump reposts anti-immigrant rant threatening China/India tariff retaliation
Hong Kong HSI -0.95% trading lower tracking Wall Street; tech names drag
Weekly jobless claims reported; UMich consumer sentiment due Apr 24
key_themes: US markets pause after record run — tech sector correction on Meta/Microsoft layoffs news
Middle East: Iran ceasefire extension (3 weeks) but Hormuz blockade stalemate continues
Oil above $106 Brent — energy disruption fears dominating macro
Gold steady ~$4,720, VIX 19.3 — risk-off but not panic
US 10Y yield 4.32% — bond market pricing cautious Fed hold
Bitcoin flat at $78K; crypto market consolidating after recent gains
A-shares set to open flat at 9:30 — watch for sector rotation from tech to energy/defense
